data.body: Full make test (14min) on stack-through-4532 found 1 real failure: tests/scripts/reducer/test_reducer_tag_delta.py::test_downgraded_clone_preserves_and_ignores — my 9858 flatten broke the downgraded-clone forward-compat sim (dict key baked at import ignored the masked TAG_DELTA/KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES). FIX: gate on KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES FIRST, then dispatch (byte-identical; handler keys == KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES exactly). Folded fix INTO 9858's commit via reset+amend+cherry-pick (new stack SHAs; backup branch janitor-backup-pre9858fix). The other reported error (test_foldin HEAD-moved) was an artifact of committing during the run; passes stable. Stack tip now 0707a7188. Lesson: full make test (incl tests/scripts) is the real gate; don't git-commit during a test run.
